title: See the footer of a mirrored NUMBER column
excerpt: On a Numbers Column that is mirrored, I would like to be able to see the SUM in the footer, as we can on a normal NUMBERS column. This would be really helpful for our figures board as we are currently struggling to set u…

posts.author: pascale (GRENIE)
posts.cookedHtml: On a Numbers Column that is mirrored, I would like to be able to see the SUM in the footer, as we can on a normal NUMBERS column. This would be really helpful for our figures board as we are currently struggling to set up something simple and straightforward. (we need to get figures from other boards to display on our FIGURES board, but we are unable to see on that board the actual sum of these mirrored columns)

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can create a new Formula column that equals the Mirror column…it should then show the summary of that formula column.

Hope this helps!

Cheers,
Harsh
